nasb.text: As the ark of the covenant of the Lord came into the camp, all Israel shouted with a great shout, so that the earth resounded.

esv.text: As soon as the ark of the covenant of the Lord came into the camp, all Israel gave a mighty shout, so that the earth resounded.

cnv.text: 耶和華的約櫃來到營中的時候，以色列眾人就大聲歡呼，大地也迴聲響應。

ccb.text: 以色列人看见耶和华的约柜到了营中，就高声欢呼，声音震天动地。
